name: World Wildlife Fund
description: WWF works in nearly 100 countries to conserve nature and reduce threats to wildlife, forests, and oceans.

name: World Animal Protection
description: World Animal Protection works to end animal suffering and promote compassionate treatment of all animals.

name: World Health Organization
mission: Promoting health and well-being for all.
description: The World Health Organization leads and coordinates international health within the United Nations system.

name: World Vision
mission: Working to end child poverty and injustice.
description: World Vision serves children and families in need around the world.

name: The Ocean Conservancy
mission: Protecting the ocean for all life.
description: The Ocean Conservancy works to protect the ocean from the challenges it faces today.

name: Oceana
mission: Protecting the ocean for all life.
description: Oceana works to protect the ocean from the challenges it faces today.

name: The Salvation Army
description: The Salvation Army provides aid to those in need, regardless of their background or circumstances.

name: The Nature Conservancy
mission: Conserving the lands and waters on which all life depends.
description: TNC protects ecologically important lands and waters for nature and people around the globe.

name: Save the Children
description: Save the Children gives children a healthy start, the opportunity to learn, and protection from harm.

name: Rainforest Alliance
description: The Rainforest Alliance works to conserve biodiversity and ensure sustainable livelihoods.
